AI / Data professional with 7+ years of experience across advanced analytics, machine learning, cloud platforms, and enterprise AI solutions. My work focuses on building scalable data and AI systems, from data engineering and model development to deploying production-ready solutions that generate actionable insights and support strategic business decisions. My experience spans financial analytics, operational optimization, and large scale customer analytics. I have worked on initiatives including automation of complex business workflows, network optimization through greenfield analysis, enterprise data migration, and churn forecasting across a 30M+ customer base. More recently, my work has focused on AI enablement, developing solutions such as conversational product recommendation engines, voice first AI workflows, and computer vision based damage estimation systems. results.title: Mike Raymond
highlights:
AI-Driven
...
Pricing Manager - Price Optimization at [United Rentals](https://www.linkedin.com/company/united-rentals)
...
I’m not just building pricing systems — I’m shaping the future of pricing, compliance, and revenue optimization. With over 25 years of experience, I’ve led pricing transformations from every angle: finance, customer-side, vendor-side, and enterprise leadership. I started my career in financial and business analysis at McKesson, The Arizona Republic, and ACS — roles that built a foundation in forecasting, revenue analysis, and compliance modeling. That analytical base gave me the toolkit to step into pricing and never look back. At RSC Equipment Rental, I worked as a Pricing Analyst during the company’s first attempt at implementing PROS pricing software. The rollout wasn’t perfect, but the lessons were priceless — I saw firsthand how adoption challenges can derail even the best strategy. From there, I was recruited to Nortel, where I implemented Vendavo (PROS’s competitor) and built pricing governance for a global business. I continued through the Avaya transition, managing pricing, rebate programs, and compliance structures. Curious to deepen my expertise, I joined Vendavo on the software side, implementing pricing systems for Fortune 500 clients. That gave me a 360° view — from customer struggles to vendor delivery — of what makes pricing software succeed or fail. I returned to RSC as Division Pricing Manager, this time leading regional strategy and designing deal scoring frameworks that improved adoption and margin performance. After RSC was acquired, I joined United Rentals, where I now lead national pricing and compliance strategy — embedding AI, automation, and agentic intelligence into pricing workflows. Today, I focus on building systems that don’t just track performance but proactively identify risks, revenue opportunities, and compliance exposures before they become problems. My passion is turning complexity into clarity — creating AI-enabled strategies and governance frameworks that executives can trust and act on.
...

results.title: Chintak Joshi
highlights:
Full Stack Engineer at [United Rentals](https://www.linkedin.com/company/united-rentals)
...
### Full Stack Engineer
...
.linkedin.com
...
Transforming rental operations into a data-driven, AI-powered ecosystem Developed a cloud-native rental lifecycle platform integrating microservices, IoT streaming, predictive analytics, and AI automation to improve fleet utilization, customer experience, and operational efficiency. Built and scaled FastAPI microservices for booking, billing, and fleet tracking, supporting thousands of concurrent transactions. Integrated Node.js middleware to streamline internal service communication and ensure consistent routing across microservices. Designed and deployed LLM-powered services to parse rental contracts, extract compliance/financial insights, and integrate outputs into backend APIs for legal and operational teams. Developed predictive analytics pipelines using IoT telemetry, Kafka, Spark, and AWS Glue to generate AI-driven fleet maintenance alerts and utilization optimization. Extended customer-facing modules with Angular + Redux, delivering responsive dashboards for booking and fleet management. Ingested GPS-enabled IoT telemetry via async APIs and Kafka streams, powering real-time dashboards and predictive analytics. Integrated Snowflake and Redshift as analytics sinks and documented schemas in AWS Glue Data Catalog for consistent discovery. Implemented full-stack observability with New Relic + ELK, enabling anomaly detection, distributed tracing, and incident triage. Automated deployment workflows using GitHub Actions and SonarQube, ensuring secure, high-quality rollouts. Improved application responsiveness with Redis caching and CloudFront CDN, reducing latency in billing and fleet portals. Mentored junior developers in Python, async APIs, Kafka streaming, and DevOps practices, fostering team growth and knowledge sharing.
...
Engineered AI/ML infrastructure, LLM services, and large-scale data pipelines that powered Claude’s enterprise deployments. My role focused on building APIs for LLM inference, RAG pipelines, data preprocessing for model training, and secure, scalable cloud deployments. Built and deployed FastAPI endpoints for LLM inference, implementing JWT/OAuth2 authentication, adaptive batching, and low-latency response handling on AWS EKS. Designed and implemented retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) pipelines using Pinecone and Weaviate, enabling secure, sub-100ms enterprise Q&A systems with custom embeddings. Developed large-scale Python data pipelines to preprocess billions of multilingual documents for LLM training (Claude 2/3), including tokenization, deduplication, and distributed I/O with Spark and Kafka. Wrote distributed PyTorch training scripts with mixed-precision, gradient accumulation, and sharding to optimize large-scale model training. Built ETL workflows to move unstructured conversational datasets into Snowflake, complementing Hadoop-based preprocessing for large training corpora. Deployed conversational AI services across AWS, GCP (GKE, Pub/Sub, Cloud Functions), and OpenShift, ensuring compliance with enterprise-grade RBAC and security. Automated infrastructure provisioning with Terraform and AWS CDK, creating VPCs, IAM roles, KMS-secured pipelines, and API Gateway integrations. Implemented observability across services with Prometheus, Grafana, New Relic, Datadog, CloudWatch, and OpenTelemetry, enabling anomaly detection and distributed tracing. Built CI/CD pipelines to enforce safety validation, including adversarial prompt regression tests that blocked unsafe model regressions before production rollout. Partnered with researchers on prompt engineering, safety filters, and red-teaming, while mentoring engineers on RAG design, LLM lifecycle management, and Claude API integration.

# Data Scientist + ML Engineer (Gen AI)
...
- Data Scientist + ML Engineer (Gen AI)
...
- We are looking for a highly skilled Data Scientist + ML Engineer (Generative AI) to join our team. In this role, you will be responsible for developing, fine-tuning, and applying advanced generative AI models - including diffusion models, large language models (LLMs), and other state-of-the-art architectures. You will collaborate closely with cross-functional partners in research, data engineering, and operations to deliver high-quality machine learning solutions and scalable datasets.
...
- Design and Implement LLM-Driven Synthetic Data Pipelines: Design and build workflows using LLMs and Gen AI techniques to create high-volume, high-quality synthetic data for model training and testing.
...
- Design, implement, and deploy machine learning models with a focus on generative AI (diffusion models, LLMs, and related architectures)
...
- Fine-tune, evaluate, and optimize large language models for specific downstream tasks and data needs
...
- Develop and maintain scalable data pipelines supporting training, evaluation, and inference workflows
...
- Partner cross-functionally with researchers, engineers, and data program managers to define requirements and deliver high-impact ML solutions
...
- REQUIRED EXPERIENCE AND SKILLS:
...
- Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or related field from an accredited U.S. institution
- 2+ years of experience in Machine Learning or Software Engineering
- Expert-level proficiency in Python and familiarity with deep learning frameworks such as PyTorch
...
- Strong foundation in machine learning algorithms, data preprocessing, and evaluation techniques
...
- Demonstrated experience working with diffusion models, stable diffusion, or large language models (LLMs)

results.title: Sr Data Scientist /Machine Learning Engineer | Careerport
highlights:
Sr Data Scientist /Machine Learning Engineer | Careerport
...
Back to Job Board
...
# Sr Data Scientist /Machine Learning Engineer

Remote, USA

Posted 2026-06-16

Full-time

 Overview UP.Labs is a dynamic venture studio dedicated to building innovative startup companies from the ground up. Our team thrives on solving complex problems, driving technological advancements, and creating impactful digital products. We're seeking a highly skilled professional to join our growing team and contribute to our mission of launching the next wave of successful startups. Technical Challenge As a Data Scientist, you will leverage advanced analytics and machine learning techniques to extract actionable insights from complex datasets and build predictive models that drive strategic decision-making. You will work with cutting-edge technologies to develop data-driven solutions that power our portfolio of mobility-focused ventures. Responsibilities Design, develop, and deploy machine learning models and data science solutions to solve complex business problems across our venture portfolio Build and maintain scalable data pipelines and analytics infrastructure using Python and Azure cloud services Implement generative AI solutions and integrate large language models into products to enhance user experiences and automate workflows Collaborate with cross-functional teams to translate business requirements into technical data science solutions Conduct exploratory data analysis, feature engineering, and model evaluation to ensure high-quality, production-ready solutions Required Skills Strong expertise in data science and machine learning methodologies, with demonstrated ability to build and deploy models in production environments Advanced proficiency in Python programming for data analysis, machine learning, and automation Solid experience with generative AI technologies and frameworks, including prompt engineering and LLM integration Working knowledge of Microsoft Azure cloud platform for deploying and scaling data science solutions Experience with modern data science libraries and frameworks such as scikit-learn, TensorFlow, PyTorch, or similar tools Strong understanding of statistical analysis, time series analysis, experimental design, and data visualization techniques Preferred Skills Experience with geospatial analysis using tools such as ESRI ArcGIS products or geopandas UP.Labs Summary We build high-growth technology startups that enable faster, cleaner, and safer movement of people and goods. Our vision is to transform the moving world by pairing leading corporations and entrepreneurs with a proven methodology for launching and scaling software and hardware companies. We work with corporate investors over a multi-year period to launch a portfolio of mobility-focused ventures. Our team is dedicated to the first year of a new venture's life cycle, from ideation to minimum viable product build (and beyond) to recruiting and hiring the full-time team who will scale the business. Location: Remote

# Senior AI/ML Engineer
...
Jobgether • United State
...
We are seeking a highly skilled AI/ML Engineer to develop advanced AI and ML solutions for the energy and utility sector. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in machine learning engineering, AI systems design, and large-scale data-driven decision-making. The role requires collaboration with cross-functional teams to design, build, and deploy scalable machine learning systems.
...
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to design, develop, and deploy scalable AI and machine learning solutions integrated into production systems
...
Build reusable Python libraries and engineering components to support ML pipelines, data processing workflows, and AI system development
...
Python AWS Azure GCP Databricks LangChain LangGraph LlamaIndex Hugging Face AutoGen
...
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for an AI / ML Engineer in the United States.This role sits at the intersection of machine learning engineering, AI systems design, and large-scale data-driven decision-making, focused on solving complex challenges in the energy and utility sector. You will contribute to the development of advanced AI and ML solutions that combine predictive modeling, optimization, and generative AI to support critical infrastructure and sustainability goals. Working closely with data scientists and software engineers, you will help design, build, and deploy scalable machine learning systems that power real-world applications. The environment is highly collaborative and innovation-driven, with a strong emphasis on applied AI, production readiness, and measurable impact. You will work across diverse use cases including forecasting, geospatial analysis, and intelligent decision systems. This is a high-impact role where your work directly supports the modernization and efficiency of energy systems.Accountabilities
...
- Collaborate with cross-functional teams to design, develop, and deploy scalable AI and machine learning solutions integrated into production systems.
...
- Build reusable Python libraries and engineering components to support ML pipelines, data processing workflows, and AI system development.
...
- Contribute to the design and implementation of modern AI architectures, including RAG systems, LLM integrations, and agent-based workflows.
...
- Develop frameworks for
...
, including reasoning
...
- Translate complex machine learning and AI requirements into structured technical tasks and actionable development plans.
...
- Stay current with advancements in machine learning engineering, generative AI, and AI orchestration, integrating best practices into workflows.
...
- Master’s degree in Computer Science, Data Science, Software Engineering, or related field (PhD preferred).
...
- 7+ years of experience building, deploying, and maintaining machine learning systems in production environments.
...
- Strong proficiency in Python, including experience building reusable packages and scalable data pipelines.
...
- Hands-on experience with cloud platforms such as AWS, Azure, or GCP, including CI/CD and containerized deployments.
...
- Solid understanding of ML system design, MLOps principles, and end-to-end model lifecycle management.
...
- Experience with distributed computing frameworks and relational/non-relational databases.
...
- Familiarity with Databricks and large-scale data processing environments.
...
- Experience working with generative AI frameworks such as LangChain, LangGraph, LlamaIndex, Hugging Face, or AutoGen.
...
- Exposure to agentic AI systems, AI orchestration, or LLM-based decision workflows is highly desirable.
...
- Nice to have: experience in the utility, energy, or power sector and strong Databricks expertise.

# Experienced Data Scientist – AI/Machine Learning Developer – Generative AI Platform Development
...
Join arenaflex, and you'll be part of a team that's changing the world one innovation at a time. We are currently seeking a talented and passionate Data Scientist to join our Cloud Technologies Application Platform team and help us build the future of developer experience through cutting-edge artificial intelligence solutions.
...
Are you ready to take your career to the next level with a company that values innovation and excellence? arenaflex is looking for an experienced Data Scientist to join our dynamic team as an AI/Machine Learning Developer. In this role, you will be instrumental in designing and executing our artificial intelligence strategy to elevate our developer experience platform to unprecedented heights.
...
This is a unique opportunity to work at the forefront of generative AI technology, collaborating with multidisciplinary teams to develop innovative solutions that will transform how developers create applications at arenaflex. You'll leverage your expertise in machine learning, deep learning, and large language models to solve complex business challenges and drive measurable impact across the organization.
...
As a Data Scientist at arenaflex, you will be responsible for driving our AI initiatives and contributing to the development of next-generation developer tools. Your key responsibilities will include:
...
Design, develop, and implement machine learning models and algorithms that enhance our developer experience platform, ensuring alignment with arenaflex's overall technology strategy.
...
Build, train, and fine-tune machine learning models, including foundation models and large language models, to address various business problems and improve developer productivity.
...
Choose appropriate machine learning algorithms, train models, and calibrate hyperparameters to achieve optimal predictive performance and model accuracy.
...
Apply deep expertise in transformer architecture, vector embeddings, and advanced ML techniques to develop solutions that solve complex business challenges.
...
Lead model deployment for experimentation, implementing A/B testing, monitoring model performance, and iterating on solutions based on empirical results.
...
Work closely with AI engineers, software developers, product managers, and other data scientists to deliver end-to-end AI-enabled solutions.
...
Experience with training models or utilizing foundation models and fine-tuning them to meet custom business requirements.
...
Bachelor's degree in Data Science, Computer
...
, Statistics, Mathematics, or a
...
Minimum of 5+ years of progressive experience in the software industry with a focused specialization in machine learning and artificial intelligence.
...
Strong understanding and extensive experience with cutting-edge machine learning algorithms, deep learning architectures, statistical modeling, and large language models.
...
- Advanced degree (Master's or PhD) in Data Science, Computer Science, or related field

- Experience applying machine learning techniques specifically in developer productivity or software development lifecycle contexts

- Knowledge of cloud platforms and infrastructure (AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud)

- Familiarity with MLOps practices and deployment pipelines

- Published research or contributions to open-source machine learning projects

- Experience with prompt engineering and LLM optimization techniques
...
If you are passionate about artificial intelligence, machine learning, and want to work on projects that will shape the future of technology, arenaflex is the place for you. We are looking for individuals who bring enthusiasm, dedication, and fresh perspectives to their work – people who are ready to push boundaries and achieve extraordinary results.
